name: Waldorf Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 small chicken breast halves (about 3 pounds), boned and skinned
1 cup diagonal slices celery (about 2 medium stalks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove excess fat from the chicken.
2. Place the chicken, half a cup of apple juice, lemon juice, salt, and ginger in a 10-inch nonstick skillet.
3. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
4. Cover and simmer about 20 minutes or until the chicken is done. Remove the chicken; keep warm.
5. Mix the remaining apple juice and cornstarch, add to hot liquid. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
6. Boil and stir for 1 minute. Stir in the remaining ingredients; heat through.
7. For each serving, diagonally slice the chicken. Arrange on a plate, overlapping slices. Top with sauce.
8. Serve 6 servings. Warm Chicken Waldorf Salad: Arrange sliced chicken on salad greens. Top with sauce.
